---
title: "SelianBlog"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    fields: [image, title, date]
  - id: recent-reviews
    contents: reviews
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    fields: [image, title, date]
---

연구와 논문 리뷰를 기록하는 블로그입니다.

## Recent Posts
:::{#recent-posts}
:::

## Recent Reviews
:::{#recent-reviews}
:::
